item.hha.jotunheims_upgrade_template.bas: Add Netherite armor, a Netherite/Diamond sword, or a mace
item.hha.hell_helmet.lore2: Undying Rage: below 3 hearts → Speed II
item.hha.hell_chestplate.lore2: Warlord's Barrier: +2 absorption hearts & Resistance I while Brutes live nearby
item.hha.hell_chestplate.lore3: Set: Hellforged — Strength I while burning or in lava
item.hha.hell_leggings.lore1: Lava Jesus: walk on lava (sneak to sink, hold jump to surface)
item.hha.hell_leggings.lore2: Fire Camp [Ability 2]: Regeneration IV + 3 allied Brutes
item.hha.hell_leggings.lore3: Magma Stomp: 6+ block falls splash 3×3 lava
item.hha.hell_boots.lore2: Ember Trail: below 5 hearts, sprinting leaves fire
item.hha.hell_boots.lore3: Trail burns through Fire Resistance and armor
item.hha.hells_sword.lore1: Crits grant 1 absorption heart until you are hit
item.hha.hells_sword.lore2: Right-click: Haste III + auto-crits for 20s (90s cooldown)
item.hha.hells_sword.lore3: Crits bless you with a golden apple's Absorption (2 min)
item.hha.hells_mace.lore2: Right-click an enemy: yank it to you — damage on arrival
item.hha.hells_mace.lore3: Right-click: grapple to any block within 32 blocks
item.hha.hells_mace.lore4: Ground grapple: bounce off the landing into a dash — the slap damages nearby enemies
item.hha.heaven_helmet.lore2: Halo: trusted players within 5 blocks get Regeneration I
item.hha.heaven_chestplate.lore2: Divine Shield: once per minute a lethal hit leaves you at 3 hearts
item.hha.heaven_chestplate.lore3: Set: Grace — sneak mid-air to glide gently
item.hha.heaven_leggings.lore1: Ascension: 3 jumps total (double jump + 1 extra mid-air)
item.hha.heaven_leggings.lore2: Shockwave: fall impact knocks back and damages nearby enemies
item.hha.heaven_boots.lore2: Heaven's Step: below 5 hearts, a trail of light follows you
item.hha.heaven_boots.lore3: Enemies in the trail get Slowness I (2s)
item.hha.heavens_sword.lore1: Every 3rd consecutive hit is an auto-crit
item.hha.heavens_sword.lore2: Right-click: light wave flings enemies in a line away (35s cooldown)
item.hha.heavens_mace.lore2: Right-click: throw 50 blocks — every target on the path is struck by lightning, then it returns
hha.msg.need_full_set: The beam requires a full Hell's or Heaven's Set!
hha.msg.trust_added: %s is now trusted — your abilities will spare them.
hha.msg.trust_self: You cannot trust yourself — you never hurt yourself anyway.
hha.msg.kit_disabled: Kit mode is disabled (/hha toggle kit_mode true).
hha.msg.kit_hell: Hell's SMP kit equipped — stay crispy!
hha.msg.kit_heaven: Heaven's SMP kit equipped — fly high!
hha.msg.faction_bound: Faction locked in: %s — switching requires all 6 pieces of the opposing set.
hha.msg.faction_switched: Faction switched: %s — the complete set is now unlocked.
hha.msg.faction_locked: %s gear locked: complete 6-piece set required. Missing: %s.
hha.msg.faction_locked_armor: %s gear locked: complete 6-piece set required. Missing: %s. Armor was returned to your inventory (or dropped at your feet if full).
hha.ultra.hell.title: 🔥 INFERNO OVERDRIVE 🔥
hha.ultra.heaven.title: ✦ SERAPH ASCENDANCE ✦
hha.ultra.subtitle: 60 seconds — no cooldowns. Go wild!
hha.info.overview.title: Hell's Armory — Help
hha.info.overview.1: All Hell's/Heaven's armor is upgraded at a smithing table exclusively from Netherite armor.
hha.info.overview.2: Set keys: Ability 1 = beam, Ability 2 = Fire Camp, Ability 3 = Ultra (defaults G/H/U); weapon abilities use right-click.
hha.info.overview.3: /info abilities explains all shared, Hell's, Heaven's, and Ultra abilities.
hha.info.overview.4: /info commands explains every player and admin command.
hha.info.overview.5: /info all displays the complete help at once.
hha.info.commands.title: Commands
hha.info.commands.3: /untrust <player> — removes that protection. Your area abilities spare trusted players.
hha.info.commands.4: /hha kit hell|heaven — gives the selected SMP kit while kit mode is enabled.
hha.info.commands.5: Admin: /hha list displays all enabled abilities and numeric values.
hha.info.commands.6: Admin: /hha toggle <key> <true|false> enables or disables an ability.
hha.info.commands.7: Admin: /hha set <key> <number> changes values; e.g. light_wave_knockback controls knockback.
hha.info.commands.8: Admin: /hha get <key> reads one value; /hha reset restores every default.
hha.info.general.title: Shared Armor Abilities
hha.info.general.1: Helmet: Regeneration I. Chestplate: Fire Resistance. Boots: Speed I and no fall damage.
hha.info.general.2: A complete Hell's or Heaven's set raises your maximum health from 10 to 20 hearts.
hha.info.general.3: Ability 1 activates the set beam; Ability 3 activates Ultra while wearing a complete set.
hha.info.general.4: Cooldown icons above the hotbar show set and weapon abilities: colored = ready, dark = cooling down.
hha.info.general.5: Trusted players and your own summoned allies are spared by your harmful abilities.
hha.info.general.6: Non-OPs permanently bind to Hell or Heaven when first possessing a set item; server operators bypass the lock.
hha.info.general.7: Opposing items may stay in your inventory, but require Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots, Sword, and Mace before use; first use switches faction.
hha.info.hell.title: Hell's Abilities
hha.info.hell.1: Helmet — Undying Rage: At 3 hearts or less you gain Speed II.
hha.info.hell.2: Chestplate — Warlord's Barrier: Nearby living Brutes grant Resistance I and 2 absorption hearts.
hha.info.hell.3: Leggings — Lava Jesus: walk on lava; sneak to dive and jump to surface.
hha.info.hell.4: Leggings — Falling 6+ blocks triggers Magma Stomp lava and area damage, plus fireballs with a full set.
hha.info.hell.5: Ability 2: Fire Camp grants Regeneration IV and summons 3 allied Piglin Brutes.
hha.info.hell.6: Boots — Below 5 hearts, sprinting leaves a damaging fire trail.
hha.info.hell.7: Full set — Hellforged grants Strength I in fire/lava; Ability 1 fires the burning lava beam.
hha.info.hell.8: Hell's Sword — Crits grant absorption; right-click grants 20 s Haste III and auto-crits (90 s cooldown).
hha.info.hell.9: Hell's Mace — 8 base damage plus vanilla smash; right-click pulls enemies and hurts them on arrival.
hha.info.hell.10: Hell's Mace — Right-click a block/own projectile to grapple; floor targets arm a bounce dash.
hha.info.heaven.title: Heaven's Abilities
hha.info.heaven.1: Helmet — Halo: Trusted players within 5 blocks receive Regeneration I.
hha.info.heaven.2: Chestplate — Divine Shield: Once every 60 s, a lethal hit leaves you alive on 3 hearts.
hha.info.heaven.3: Leggings — Ascension: After the normal jump, 2 additional mid-air jumps are available.
hha.info.heaven.4: Leggings — Falling 6+ blocks triggers a damaging, knockback shockwave.
hha.info.heaven.5: Boots — Below 5 hearts, you leave a light trail that slows enemies.
hha.info.heaven.6: Full set — Sneak in mid-air to glide gently with Grace.
hha.info.heaven.7: Ability 1 fires a light beam: it damages enemies and heals/cleanses trusted players.
hha.info.heaven.8: Heaven's Sword — Every 3rd fully charged hit auto-crits; right-click creates the light wave.
hha.info.heaven.9: Light Wave damages and flings enemies; admins control its strength with light_wave_knockback.
hha.info.heaven.10: Heaven's Mace — 8 base damage plus vanilla smash; right-click throws it 50 blocks, strikes targets with lightning, and returns.
hha.info.ultra.title: Ultra Mode
hha.info.ultra.1: Ability 3 with a full set: HHA cooldowns are continuously removed for 60 seconds, followed by a 5-minute cooldown.
hha.info.ultra.2: Hell's Ultra: Strength II, Speed II, Fire Resistance, Resistance, and a burning damage aura.
hha.info.ultra.3: Heaven's Ultra: Regeneration II, Speed II, Resistance, Jump Boost II, and healing for allies.
hha.info.footer: Pages: /info commands | general | hell | heaven | ultra | abilities | all
